title: Boccaccio '70
director: Vittorio De Sica, Federico Fellini, Mario Monicelli
writer: Cesare Zavattini, Giovanni Arpino, Italo Calvino
actors: Anita Ekberg, Sophia Loren, Romy Schneider
plot: Inspired by Boccaccio's novellas, each episode focuses on sex, love and seduction in Italy in the 1960s, an era of economic growth and major cultural changes.
